name: Pain Science & Activity Pacing - Occupational Therapy Staff Training
descriptionHeading: Evidence-Based Pain Neuroscience for Occupational Therapy Clinicians
description: Staff training course covering pain neuroscience education, activity pacing, and therapeutic use of occupation for clients with persistent pain. Co-developed by Frank Schultz OTR/L and Dr. Lisa Tran.

name: Level II Fieldwork - Professional Supervision Track
descriptionHeading: Occupational Therapy Fieldwork Supervision: Bitterroot Rehab Center
description: Structured Level II fieldwork supervision course for Occupational Therapy students placed at Bitterroot Rehabilitation Center. Supervisor: Frank Schultz OTR/L. Current student: Jasmine Park.

name: privacy & Reader Privacy - Annual Staff Training
descriptionHeading: privacy Compliance for Allied Health Professionals
description: Mandatory annual privacy training for all Bitterroot Rehab professional staff. Covers private data handling, minimum necessary standard, remote coaching privacy, and breach reporting procedures.

name: Splinting & Orthotic Fabrication - Skill Lab
descriptionHeading: Upper Extremity Splinting Competency for OTs
description: Hands-on competency course for UE static and dynamic splinting. Covers thermoplastic fabrication, fit assessment, and participant education. Required for all Occupational Therapy staff.

name: remote coaching Occupational Therapy - Platform Training & Best Practices
descriptionHeading: remote coaching Delivery of Occupational Therapy Services
description: Training on Bitterroot Rehab's approved remote coaching platform, documentation requirements, person consent, and best practices for delivering Occupational Therapy services remotely.
